resources.string: You can copy, launch, and manage apps in the clone space.
Create or repair the work profile before copying apps.
Resume clone space before launching apps inside it.
Run a second, independent copy of your apps safely on the same device.
Copy installed apps into a separate clone space with its own data.
Clone space uses its own accounts and storage, separated from your main apps.
Move files between main space and clone space with explicit consent.

PrismSpace creates the clone space via Android Work Profile. Core clone, install and file-transfer flows run locally; update checks, PrismProbe network tests and diagnostic sharing only run when you choose them.
Sorry, the required feature \"Managed Profile\" is not supported on this device.

PrismSpace setup is incomplete, the previous attempt might be unsuccessful.\n\nIf your device ROM or 3rd-party tool enforce auto-start control (or similar background-restriction functionality), please whitelist PrismSpace in related settings, then continue the setup.
Sorry, PrismSpace cannot be setup due to device currently being managed by %1$s.
Sorry, the required \"Android for Work\" feature may not be fully supported on your device.

Trouble setting up PrismSpace?

If setup was interrupted, return to the system setup screen and keep PrismSpace allowed to start in the background. On heavily customized ROMs, also disable battery or security restrictions for PrismSpace before retrying.

Root setup is available as an advanced fallback only when normal setup is blocked.

PrismSpace creates a managed clone space through Android work profile setup.

If setup fails, check these items first:
· Keep PrismSpace allowed to run in the background.
· Do not close the system provisioning screen while it is working.
· Disable aggressive security or battery restrictions for PrismSpace, then retry.
· Use root setup only as an advanced fallback when normal setup is blocked.

App copy needs either Android\'s install-existing path, an available system app store, Shizuku/ADB permission, or the PrismSpace installer module.\n\nIf this device blocks the current path, enable Shizuku/ADB mode in Settings or install the app in main space first, then copy it again.

Main-space management gives PrismSpace device-wide control, not just clone-space control. Use it only if you need features such as freezing main-space apps or applying ADB protection to the whole device.\n\nThis is optional. Clone-space app copy and launch do not require main-space management.
PrismSpace was unexpectedly deactivated, please grant the Device Admin permission to re-activate.
Are you sure you want to destroy the whole PrismSpace? You will LOSE ALL THE DATA in PrismSpace.\n\nDon\'t worry, apps and data outside PrismSpace will NEVER be affected.
If main space is also managed by PrismSpace, you cannot re-create PrismSpace space unless the control for main space is rescinded.\n\nAre you sure you still want to destroy the PrismSpace?
Are you sure to rescind?\n\nYou will have to go through the setup flow again to bring it back, that means PrismSpace space and all accounts must be removed first if your device is not rooted.
To remove the whole PrismSpace space, please open system \"Settings - Accounts\" and select \"Remove work profile\".

This app (or component) is critical for the Android system or other apps to work properly. If proceed, some apps or the whole system may become unstable or malfunctional.\n\nDo you really want to proceed?
Sorry, something went wrong in PrismSpace setup. (stage %1$d)
A PrismSpace clone space already exists on this device. To create it again, first remove the existing one from the main space, then try setup again.

System app can only be disabled. It\'s similar to the removal of an installed app.\n\nPrismSpace has no privilege to do that, instead you will be redirected to the system settings app, there you can click the \"DISABLE\" button to proceed.
Root access is required for automatic cloning. Enable Root in Settings, or use Shizuku / Play / file methods instead.
Transferring the installer to the dual space…

The full installer was copied to Download/PrismSpace in the dual space. Open the dual-space install entry and confirm with Android\'s system installer. To install a single APK from the system file manager, allow that file manager to install unknown apps first.
PrismSpace is not ready. Open Settings and check setup status or permission mode.
Failed to verify, please try again.
